mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM sku_registry WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sku_registry (code, aggregate_id, name, unit_of_measure, version, updated_at) VALUES (#{row.code}, #{row.aggregateId}, #{row.name}, #{row.unitOfMeasure}, #{row.version}, now()) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET aggregate_id = excluded.aggregate_id, name = excluded.name, unit_of_measure = excluded.unit_of_measure, version = excluded.version, updated_at = now() WHERE excluded.version > sku_registry.version
